configurations.name: static
runtimeArgs: const{createServer}=require('http'),{readFile,stat}=require('fs/promises'),{join,extname,normalize}=require('path');const ROOT=process.cwd(),M={'.html':'text/html; charset=utf-8','.js':'text/javascript; charset=utf-8','.mjs':'text/javascript; charset=utf-8','.json':'application/json; charset=utf-8','.css':'text/css; charset=utf-8','.wasm':'application/wasm','.svg':'image/svg+xml'};createServer(async(req,res)=>{try{let p=decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]);if(p==='/')p='/index.html';const f=normalize(join(ROOT,p));if(!f.startsWith(ROOT)){res.writeHead(403);return res.end('forbidden')}const s=await stat(f),file=s.isDirectory()?join(f,'index.html'):f,b=await readFile(file);res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':M[extname(file)]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(b)}catch{res.writeHead(404);res.end('not found')}}).listen(8000,()=>console.log('serving '+ROOT+' on http://localhost:8000'));
